mapper.select: SELECT t.*, u.real_name AS assignee_name, z.zone_name FROM farm_task t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.assignee_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON t.zone_id = z.id WHERE t.zone_id = #{zoneId} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT t.*, u.real_name AS assignee_name, z.zone_name FROM farm_task t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.assignee_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON t.zone_id = z.id WHERE t.assignee_id = #{assigneeId} ORDER BY t.deadline ASC
SELECT t.*, u.real_name AS assignee_name, z.zone_name FROM farm_task t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.assignee_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON t.zone_id = z.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO farm_task(zone_id, task_name, task_type, description, assignee_id, creator_id, row_no, deadline, status) VALUES(#{zoneId}, #{taskName}, #{taskType}, #{description}, #{assigneeId}, #{creatorId}, #{rowNo}, #{deadline}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM farm_task WHERE zone_id = #{zoneId} AND status = #{status}
